alkylation reagent: alkylated in a final concentration of 20 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated in a final concentration of 20 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 1 µg trypsin was added per 40 µg of protein
fractionation method: ultrafiltration combined with size exclusion chromatography (UF-SEC)
fragmentation method: high-energy collision-induced dissociation (HCD) tandem mass spectra
instrument: performed on a Q-Exactive plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: A nanospray ion source (Thermo Scientific) was used
reduction reagent: reduced in a final concentration of 5 mM dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: reduced in a final concentration of 5 mM dithiothreitol
